positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_picuris
% SZS output start Proof for pos_picuris
1. range_in(picuris,nm) | range_in(picuris,tx) [input(axiom)]
2. visited(juan,picuris) [input(axiom)]
3. mine_in(harding,picuris) & donated(harding) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0,X1] : ((range_in(X0,tx) & mine_in(X1,X0) & donated(X1)) => $false) [input(axiom)]
6. ? [X0] : (range_in(X0,nm) & visited(juan,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~? [X0] : (range_in(X0,nm) & visited(juan,X0)) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ! [X0,X1] : ~(range_in(X0,tx) & mine_in(X1,X0) & donated(X1)) [true and false elimination 4]
9. ! [X0,X1] : (~range_in(X0,tx) | ~mine_in(X1,X0) | ~donated(X1)) [ennf transformation 8]
10. ! [X0] : (~range_in(X0,nm) | ~visited(juan,X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
11. range_in(picuris,nm) | range_in(picuris,tx) [cnf transformation 1]
12. visited(juan,picuris) [cnf transformation 2]
13. donated(harding) [cnf transformation 3]
14. mine_in(harding,picuris) [cnf transformation 3]
15. ~mine_in(X1,X0) | ~range_in(X0,tx) | ~donated(X1) [cnf transformation 9]
26. ~visited(juan,X0) | ~range_in(X0,nm) [cnf transformation 10]
28. 1 <=> range_in(picuris,tx) [avatar definition]
30. range_in(picuris,tx) <- (1) [avatar component clause 28]
32. 2 <=> range_in(picuris,nm) [avatar definition]
34. range_in(picuris,nm) <- (2) [avatar component clause 32]
35. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 11,32,28]
36. ~range_in(picuris,nm) [resolution 12,26]
37. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 36,34]
38. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 37]
39. ~range_in(picuris,tx) | ~donated(harding) [resolution 15,14]
40. ~donated(harding) <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 39,30]
41. $false <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 40,13]
42. ~1 [avatar contradiction clause 41]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 35]
s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 38]
s3. ~1 [sat_conversion 42]
s4. # [rat s1,s2,s3]
43. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_picuris
% Termination reason: Refutation
